children.heading: Sense of Congress
children.label: 1 Sense of Congress
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that the Federal air marshal program is critical to aviation security.

children.heading: Limitation on statutory construction
children.label: 2 Limitation on statutory construction
children.text: Nothing in this chapter, including any amendment made by this chapter, shall be construed as preventing the Under Secretary of Transportation for Security from implementing and training Federal air marshals.
